en: I'm just talking, I'll stare at your mouth
ko: 그냥 얘기하는 건데, 네 입술을 쳐다보게 돼

en: It could be bad, but I wanna find out
ko: 안 좋을 수도 있지만, 알아보고 싶어

en: And I wake up, in the middle of the night
With the light on, and I feel like I could die
ko: 불을 켠 채로, 죽을 것 같은 기분이야

en: Cause you're not here, and it don't feel right
ko: 네가 여기 없으니까, 뭔가 잘못된 느낌이야

en: Watch this be the wrong thing
I'm jumping in the deep end
And hurt the risk is drowning
I'm gonna take it Isn't it fun?
Thinking I'm right when I'm probably wrong
Holding my breath like I'm at someone
ko: 누군가 앞에 있는 것처럼 숨을 참고

en: Knowing damn well that I haven't been touched by you
ko: 네가 나를 만진 적 없다는 걸 잘 알면서도

en: In my head, you're in the car And you're coming to me And you get to my door And you can't even speak But I think that it's sweet
ko: 내 머릿속에선 넌 차 안에 있고 나한테 오고 있어 내 문 앞에 도착하면 말도 못 하지만 그게 달콤하다고 생각해
